arts.ttl: Liverpool star offers himself to club – Transfer self-marketing ahead of summer window opening
arts.sum: Liverpool star Luis Diaz has offered himself to Barcelona and told the club he is open to a move in the summer transfer window. That’s according to El Chiringuito and journalist Jose Alvarez, who reports that Diaz’s agents have been speaking to Barcelona and director of football Deco. arts.ttl: Southampton player in sights after signing Aston Villa youngster – Summer strategy already in works
arts.sum: RB Leipzig are targeting a summer move for Southampton youngster Tyler Dibling after signing Kosta Nedeljkovic from Aston Villa in January. That’s according to BILD, who report that the Aston Villa youngster’s arrival was the start of a focus on youth from the German side.
